Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. 2026-04-07T08:03:37.3257325Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3257474Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3257825Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3258156Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3258263Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3258406Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3258485Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3258662Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-07T08:03:37.3258737Z [36;1mfi[0m
